cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. First, we need to look at all the times Anthony was seen doing various things. The key here is to find out when he wasn't busy, and then check if the amusement park was open during those times. So, Anthony woke up at 6am. Then Leslie saw him at the library reading from 6am to 8am. That means he was occupied there until 8am. Then Jennifer saw him at the gym from 8am to 9am. So after 8am, he was working out. Then Anthony (maybe himself?) saw Anthony at the bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Wait, that's a long time, but that's what it says. Then William saw Anthony buying a bike at the bike shop from 9pm to 10pm. The park closes after 10pm. Now, the question is, when was Anthony free
